tax_note: Micro-entreprise: flat rate ~22% social charges; TVA exemption under €36.8K for services

vat_gst.name: TVA (Taxe sur la Valeur Ajoutée / VAT)
vat_gst.registration_threshold: €36,800 for services; €91,900 for goods (2025 thresholds, adjusted annually)
vat_gst.registration_threshold_note: Micro-entreprise regime provides TVA franchise (exemption) below threshold. Above threshold, TVA registration is mandatory. Voluntary registration available at any level.
vat_gst.digital_products: Digital products sold to French/EU consumers are subject to 20% TVA. Cross-border EU B2C sales can use OSS (One Stop Shop). The micro-entreprise TVA exemption applies to digital products as long as total revenue stays below the threshold.

digital_product_tax: Digital products are standard-rated at 20% TVA. Under micro-entreprise regime, you can benefit from TVA franchise (no TVA charged or collected) below the threshold. This simplifies pricing but means you cannot reclaim TVA on business purchases.

entity_comparison.annual_cost: €0 (no fixed fees; social charges are percentage-based on revenue)
entity_comparison.liability: Unlimited personal liability (patrimoine personnel at risk)
entity_comparison.tax_treatment: Flat social charges ~22% on revenue (not profit). Optional versement libératoire for income tax (~2.2% on revenue). Revenue cap: €77.7K for services.
entity_comparison.best_for: Starting out; simplest possible structure; ideal for freelancing and digital products under €77K

entity_comparison.liability: Limited to company assets (€1 minimum capital)
entity_comparison.tax_treatment: IS (Impôt sur les Sociétés) 15% on first €42.5K profit, 25% above. President salary subject to social charges ~45%. Dividends subject to flat tax 30% (PFU).
entity_comparison.best_for: Revenue above €77K; seeking liability protection; planning for growth

entity_comparison.tax_treatment: Default: IR (income tax, profits taxed personally). Can opt for IS (corporate tax). Social charges ~45% on manager remuneration.
entity_comparison.best_for: Alternative to SASU with different social charge structure; popular with consultants

isp_note: Fibre FTTH widely available; Free/Orange/SFR competitive pricing
